reason: Replace four contradictory Benin salary implementations with one reviewed monthly ITS engine. CGI 2026 Articles 122-125 establish the monthly gross tax base, five marginal bands and March/June ORTB levies. Employee CNSS is 3.6% and is not excluded from the ITS base; employer contributions combine 9% family benefits, 6.4% pension and a selectable 1%-4% occupational-risk rate. English, French, Swahili, server and widget now share this contract.

fixtureDeltas.reason: At XOF 1,000,000 annualized ordinary gross, monthly ITS is calculated on XOF 83,333.33 without subtracting employee CNSS; the annual result includes both ORTB levies.
The high-income case now applies the official 30% marginal monthly top band, 3.6% employee CNSS and scheduled ORTB levies using exact intermediate values.
The zero-income baseline remains unchanged under the reviewed shared engine.
